title: AI vs. Fund Managers: The Battle for Alpha
description: With the rise of artificial intelligence, fund managers face the threat of AI-powered investment analysis. While AI excels in avoiding common cognitive biases, human managers can still outperform where AI's judgment falls short. Studies urge managers to harness unpredictability for generating alpha in evolving AI landscapes.
